description_long: This is a modern, tactical-style rifle with a matte black metal receiver and barrel, complemented by tan polymer components on the stock and pistol grip. The rifle features a prominent handguard with ribbed texturing for improved grip and heat dissipation, and a detachable box magazine inserted into the magwell, with two additional magazines placed nearby. The stock is fixed and robust, designed for stability and comfort during use, while the barrel is of standard length and fitted with a flash hider at the muzzle. Iron sights are mounted on the top rail, providing basic aiming capability. The overall design is utilitarian and rugged, suitable for urban environments where reliability and ease of handling are essential.
description: A modern tactical rifle with a black metal body, tan stock and grip, ribbed handguard, iron sights, and detachable magazines. The design is robust and functional, ideal for urban use.
description_view_0: Front view showing the muzzle, flash hider, and the alignment of the iron sights.
description_view_1: Left side view displaying the full profile, tan stock and grip, ribbed handguard, and three detachable magazines.
description_view_2: Rear view highlighting the stock, pistol grip, and the symmetry of the handguard and barrel.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, showing the rifle's profile, tan components, and magazines.
